headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Eversource Energy, Lowers Price Target to $72
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $73 to $72.
